# Werner Method

**Summary**: A technique for determining the depth to magnetic sources from aeromagnetic data.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2020-abdallah-2|Abdallah, 2020]] used the Werner method to calculate the depth to a segment of the anomaly profile (the window).

## Key Results and Findings

- Good solutions cluster over the source location, while poor solutions are obtained away from the source. ([[2020-abdallah-2|Abdallah, 2020, p. 49]])
